title: Lesson 440
transcript: You'll be happy to know that this is the shortest video you'll ever see, all right? And just to finish off, layer number one in the OSI model. These are all layer one devices, hubs, repeaters, And if you go back to our discussion on security and how it fits in with the OSI model, because these are devices that operate at layer one, obviously they're going to be very fast, very efficient. But also very dumb they don't have any intelligence for us to be able to use them to make any sort of decisions they just can't do that, but they are very efficient very fast devices that cannot interpret or make any sort of decisions related to security alright so hubs. repeaters, concentrators, layer one devices that are very efficient, very fast, but cannot make any sort of security decisions.
